title: Revised direction issued to Halton Borough Council: February 2025
body: "This direction requires the Council to continue to co-operate with the Department for Education Children’s Services Improvement Adviser.  It follows:    Ofsted’s inspection report of Halton Borough Council’s children’s services, published 12 July 2024, that judged services to be Inadequate across all sub judgements an independent report by Steve Walker, the Halton Children’s Services Commissioner at the time   This direction replaces the earlier statutory direction issued to Halton Borough Council on 30 August 2024. "

taxons.title: Inspections of local authority children's services
